item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 39min ROUND-UP: There were wins in the @ElectricIreland Connacht Minor Football Championship th
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 39min ROUND-UP: There were wins in the @ElectricIreland Connacht Minor Football Championship this evening for @Galway_GAA and @sligogaa . #GAABelong De gaa.ie 1 1 1 mil
